recommendations.title: The Next 365 Days
recommendations.overview: Laura and Massimo's relationship hangs in the balance as they try to overcome trust issues while a tenacious Nacho works to push them apart.

recommendations.title: Ogni maledetto Natale
recommendations.overview: Massimo Marinelli Lops and Giulia Colardo meet by chance in Rome and fall in love. Giulia asks Massimo to spend Christmas Eve with her family.
recommendations.director: Luca Vendruscolo, Giacomo Ciarrapico, Mattia Torre

recommendations.title: The Notebook

recommendations.title: His Secret Life
recommendations.overview: When Antonia's husband Massimo is killed in a car accident, she accidentally discovers that he has been having a same-sex affair with a produce wholesaler named Michele.

recommendations.title: Leap Year

recommendations.title: Paterson
recommendations.overview: A week in the life of Paterson, a poet bus driver, and his wife Laura, a very creative artist, who live in Paterson, New Jersey, hometown of many famous poets and artists.

recommendations.title: Our Struggles

recommendations.title: Loving
recommendations.overview: Laura and Carlos love each other as if every day was the last, and perhaps that first love intensity is what will tear them apart a year later.
